archetype.name: Bounty Hunter
archetype.note: This archetype offers Double Prey at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Game Hunter
archetype.note: This archetype offers Double Prey at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Double Prey
feat.text: You can focus on two foes at once, hunting both of them down. When you use the Hunt Prey action, you can pick two creatures as your prey.

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
